ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "arena" TEXT /* The name of the team's home arena */,
  "city" TEXT /* The city where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* The state where the team is based */,
  "established" INTEGER /* The year the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, exhibition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "fg" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "fg_percent" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_fg" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made */,
  "three_fga" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted */,
  "three_fg_percent" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "ft" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "ft_percent" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "orb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "drb" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds */,
  "trb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays (e.g., point guard, power forward) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  "college" TEXT /* College attended by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "fg_percent" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "win_loss_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the staff member belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the staff member (e.g., general manager, trainer) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the staff member */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the current role */,
  "previous_roles" TEXT /* Previous roles held by the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, coach, player) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who signed the contract */,
  "contract_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was signed */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks" (
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that owns the draft pick */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the draft */,
  "pick" INTEGER /* Overall pick number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
